sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Free Movement Combat
special_mechanics.description: Player can move freely around the screen while pressing buttons to punch, kick, or jump, similar to Double Dragon

special_mechanics.name: Item Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Players can use melee weapons like brass knuckles, steel pipes, and trash cans, either as melee weapons or throw them at enemies

special_mechanics.name: Non-Linear Open World
special_mechanics.description: Sandbox-style exploration of River City with ability to travel between locations freely

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources document gameplay mechanics, sprite graphics, ROM structure, and localization differences, but do not contain specific physics values for movement, gravity, acceleration, or jump mechanics. Technical movement parameters were not documented by the developer or in reverse-engineering sources consulted.
sources_used: data_crystal - River City Ransom technical ROM information
tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor gameplay and development details
